events.event_description: Diplomatic relations established with a nonresident Chargé d'Affaires ad interim resident at Brazzaville presenting credentials.

evidence.quote: Diplomatic relations were established on August 17, 1960, when Alan W. Lukens (resident at Brazzaville) presented his credentials as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

events.event_description: Embassy Libreville established with a resident Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

evidence.quote: Embassy Libreville was established on March 20, 1961, with Walker A. Diamanti as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.
